prompt: Create a vertical editorial portrait illustration of a poised Nigerian Yoruba woman in traditional ceremonial attire, shown from mid-torso up in a proud three-quarter pose looking to the right. She wears a dark indigo patterned gele headwrap, an off-shoulder matching indigo wrapper with cream botanical and geometric textile motifs, large coral bead drop earrings, multiple layered coral bead necklaces, and stacked coral bead bracelets on one wrist. Her face is elegant and sculptural with warm brown skin, glossy red-orange lips, defined brows, winged eyeliner, and a calm regal expression. Render the portrait in a bold Afro-futurist cubist style: angular low-poly planes across the face and body, sharp faceted highlights and shadows, painterly screen-print texture, slightly weathered paper grain, and deep navy shadows. Use a dramatic abstract geometric background with cream, black-navy, and vivid red-orange blocks: a tall cream diagonal strip on the left, a large dark navy top area, a bright red-orange rectangle behind her head on the right, and one small textile-inspired panel on the left with vertical white stripes and triangular patterns. Color palette: indigo navy, warm tan skin tones, coral red-orange jewelry, cream, charcoal black, and muted gold. High-fashion poster composition, strong diagonal framing, crisp graphic contrast, no text, no watermark.
